'''wakomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jhakri|jhakri]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jhakri|jhakri]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wakomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wækemeth|wækemeth]] || [[word:wækemej|wækemej]] || [[word:wækemesh|wækemesh]] || [[word:wækeme|wækeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wakokomoth|wakokomoth]] || [[word:wakokomoj|wakokomoj]] || [[word:wakokomosh|wakokomosh]] || [[word:wakokomo|wakokomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wakomoth|wakomoth]] || [[word:wakomoj|wakomoj]] || [[word:wakomosh|wakomosh]] || [[word:wakomo|wakomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wakofmoth|wakofmoth]] || [[word:wakofmoj|wakofmoj]] || [[word:wakofmosh|wakofmosh]] || [[word:wakofmof|wakofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wakomotho|wakomotho]] || [[word:wakomojo|wakomojo]] || [[word:wakomosho|wakomosho]] || [[word:wakomoko|wakomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wakomoth|wakomoth]] || [[word:wakomoj|wakomoj]] || [[word:wakomosh|wakomosh]] || [[word:wakomo|wakomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wakomothol|wakomothol]] || [[word:wakomojol|wakomojol]] || [[word:wakomoshol|wakomoshol]] || [[word:wakomokol|wakomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wakomothotho|wakomothotho]] || [[word:wakomojojo|wakomojojo]] || [[word:wakomoshosho|wakomoshosho]] || [[word:wakomoko|wakomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wakomothon|wakomothon]] || [[word:wakomojon|wakomojon]] || [[word:wakomoshon|wakomoshon]] || [[word:wakomokon|wakomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wakomothoro|wakomothoro]] || [[word:wakomojoro|wakomojoro]] || [[word:wakomoshoro|wakomoshoro]] || [[word:wakomokoro|wakomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
